project: Prompt refinement, live/local truth audit, sentence-level copy cleanup, and reviewer regeneration for babayara.com

quoted_defect_audit.requested_line_summary: Two-sentence research-intro/process note about keeping papers, versions, and conflict notes together.
quoted_defect_audit.live_site_status: absent on deployed home page fetched 2026-03-07
quoted_defect_audit.local_bundle_status: absent from shipped public HTML in the local bundle
quoted_defect_audit.live_site_actual_intro: Filter by topic, status, or a keyword. All papers remain readable without JavaScript.
quoted_defect_audit.local_bundle_intro: Published and working papers are listed below.
quoted_defect_audit.rule: Never claim a line was removed from 'the website' until the exact text has been checked against the deployed page, the local draft, both, or neither.

web_observed_this_run: Official Indiana Kelley directory/profile snippets and IU vita PDF
Published JFE and Review of Finance records
Public SSRN / repository / public-PDF records for working papers
Deployed home page text fetched from babayara.com
OpenAI, MDN, W3C, GitHub Docs, and NNGroup guidance for context engineering and web quality
method_provenance.render_honesty: Current run visually inspected the provided desktop/mobile render artifacts and the actual local HTML DOM. It did not reproduce a fresh browser-engine render, so inherited bundle claims about Chromium/Playwright are treated as historical artifacts rather than current-run facts.

fresh_browser_render_attempt_2026_03_07.impact: Current run relies on local HTML DOM inspection plus provided render artifacts for visual review; no fresh browser-engine screenshot was produced in this environment.

highest_salience.claim: Official Kelley/IU sources use fababa@iu.edu, while the live page still shows fbabayara@iu.edu.
highest_salience.action: Keep the official email in the local bundle and describe the live mismatch plainly.

highest_salience.claim: The exact user-quoted sentence is absent from both the deployed page and the local public HTML.
highest_salience.action: Do not claim a live deletion. Log the absence honestly and keep the sentence out of public artifacts.

highest_salience.claim: The employee-news project still has real public title/coauthor drift.
highest_salience.action: Use one canonical visible entry, then subordinate the drift note.

highest_salience.claim: The factor-model paper has a local-only newer CV title that is not the current public SSRN title.
highest_salience.action: Do not surface the local-only title as public fact without verification.

highest_salience.claim: Current-run render claims must be method-specific and honest.
highest_salience.action: Describe provided render artifacts as provided render artifacts; do not inherit tool-method claims uncritically.

highest_salience.claim: The page already satisfies the high-level brief: calm, local-first, semantic, and free of essential JavaScript.
highest_salience.action: Keep changes narrow and sentence-level unless evidence points to a structural defect.

public_variants: Risk from the Inside Out: Understanding Firm Risk through Employee News Consumption
author_variants: four-author older public record including Carter Davis
research_conflict_matrix.public_page_choice: Use the March 2024 title and author line, then disclose earlier public drift in one short note.

public_variants: The Limits of Factor Model Spanning
Messy Asset Pricing: Are Asset Pricing Models Moving Toward a Consensus?
author_variants: local CV title newer than current public SSRN title
research_conflict_matrix.public_page_choice: Keep the public page aligned to the current public SSRN title.

visual_findings: The page still reads like an edited document rather than a dashboard.
No structural layout defect forced a CSS rewrite in this run.
The copy benefited from a few sentence-level edits: less colloquial phrasing in the multifactor blurb, cleaner drift-note grammar, and slightly tighter value and employee-news summaries.
Because the visual brief was already largely met, the best improvement was semantic and editorial, not decorative.
done: Prompt guardrails refined in two passes.
Current-state response refined in three passes.
Sentence register regenerated from the final local copy with honest source labeling.
Reviewer files and debate transcripts regenerated from the final sentence register.
Spec patched so the embedded final index and current response match the shipped files.
